meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template for No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio trap with the Antigravity project template. A high-impact, intermediate guide for founders to ship SaaS faster with Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap isn't a lack of talent; it's a failure to demonstrate market-ready velocity. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you can bootstrap a production-grade SaaS architecture in minutes, allowing you to ship a high-value MVP that proves your technical capability and secures your first paying customers.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the weight of 'no portfolio' hanging over your head like a lead anchor. Prospects don't care about your potential; they care about what you've shipped. Every day you spend agonizing over the perfect project is a day your competitors are capturing market share.

The shift happens when you stop building from scratch and start building on foundations designed for scale. Using the Antigravity project template, you move from a blank slate to a fully functional, production-ready environment in the time it takes to brew a coffee. This is how you transform from an aspiring builder into a battle-tested founder.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure that handles authentication, database connections, and API routing out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js 15, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define the Monetization Logic
steps.description: Inject your core value proposition into the template's existing billing flow to ensure you can accept payments on day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe webhook handlers and subscription tiers based on a SaaS model charging $29/month for core AI features.

steps.title: Implement AI Orchestration
steps.description: Connect Claude Code to the backend to automate data processing and user-facing AI responses within the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up an API route that uses Anthropic's latest model to process user input and return structured JSON responses.

steps.title: Schema Hardening
steps.description: Refine the database schema to ensure it handles real-world concurrency and user data isolation, crucial for a professional portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate RLS policies for the Supabase schema that ensure users can only access their own project data.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline so your project automatically deploys to Vercel/AWS upon every push to main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deployment to production on every merge to main.

pro_tips: Never build a full CRUD app from scratch; use the Antigravity template to generate the boilerplate so you can focus on unique business logic.
Showcase your 'Time-to-Market' metric in your portfolio; investors value founders who ship in days, not months.
Always include a 'Public Roadmap' page in your template; it demonstrates strategic thinking and builds trust with potential users.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your critical billing paths; a portfolio piece with 90%+ test coverage proves engineering maturity.
Keep your project scoped to one specific problem; a narrow, perfect solution is more impressive than a bloated, half-finished platform.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, document the 'Founder's Journey' behind the build on social media to attract your first users and validate your market niche.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the 'no portfolio' myth hold your career hostage. Use these tools to launch a product that demands attention, proves your expertise, and generates real revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
